diagnosis.root_cause_hypothesis: Tool-call arguments fail schema (e.g. query format, length); model or tool contract mismatch.
diagnosis.next_action: Align tool arg_schema with actual usage; add data/examples for correct query formulation; consider data if many variants fail.

data_requests.what_to_collect: Collect tool-call examples with correct query formulation; include negative examples of malformed args.
data_requests.template_hint: Add templates that force query formatting constraints (length, keywords); grade via arg_schema.
